title: Surepp
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Surepp''' were animals herded by the [[Alwari]] clans of [[Ansion/Legends|Ansion]]. They had three eyes arranged vertically, the top eye used to scan for aerial prey, the middle eye for looking ahead, and the bottom eye to search for food on the ground. This ocular arrangement gave very poor peripheral vision, but since surepp herds contained thousands of animals they had enough eyes to look everywhere. Their size and the number of their herds meant that predators rarely gave them trouble. They were popular among the richer clans, who used them for milk, meat, wool, and hides (in the past, their antlers and teeth had been used for toolmaking).

Male surepp had coiled antlers, blue fur, and dark neck ruffs; females were slightly larger, had green fur, and lacked ruffs. Less than one in a thousand were albinos.

In [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]], it was a tuft of fur from an albino surepp that four [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Ambassador/Legends|ambassadors]]—[[Jedi Master/Legends|Masters]] [[Luminara Unduli/Legends|Luminara Unduli]] and [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]], and [[Padawan/Legends|Padawans]] [[Barriss Offee/Legends|Barriss Offee]] and [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]]—were challenged by the [[Borokii]] [[overclan]] [[Borokii Council of Elders|council of elders]] to secure, if the Jedi diplomats hoped to gain an audience with them to hear the [[Jedi High Council/Legends|Jedi Council's]] proposal for keeping [[Separatist Crisis/Legends|secession]]-threatened [[Ansion/Legends|Ansion]] within the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]. This near-impossible task was accomplished in a remarkable feat spearheaded by Master Unduli, which almost proved fatal when she lost her footing skimming across the backs of the native surepp and fell in the midst of the massive herd. But Kenobi and the Padawans, with the aid of [[The Force/Legends|the Force]], were able to rescue her—and the tuft of white surepp wool they'd been challenged to deliver—and thereafter meet with the elders. As a result, the Jedi ultimately were successful in [[Border dispute on Ansion/Legends|their mission]] to secure a lasting peace between the Alwari overclans and Ansion's [[Unity of Community]], which ensured the planet's retention within the Republic.

==Appearances==
*''[[The Approaching Storm]]'' {{1st}}
*[[The Approaching Storm (abridged audiobook)|''The Approaching Storm'' abridged audiobook]]
